name: TeamAgent Vibeathon Demo
brief: Build a production-ready Next.js 14 multi-agent orchestration app where an admin defines team roles, AI assigns role-matched tasks, schedules dependencies and handoffs day-by-day, sends email/Slack notifications, and provides each member a private helper assistant. Include paid x402 calls per agent action settled via Facinet on Avalanche Fuji and clear dashboard visibility for task delivery.

name: TeamAgent Vibeathon Demo 2
brief: Build a production-ready Next.js 14 multi-agent orchestration app where an admin defines team roles, AI assigns role-matched tasks, schedules dependencies and handoffs day-by-day, sends email/Slack notifications, and provides each member a private helper assistant. Include paid x402 calls per agent action settled via Facinet on Avalanche Fuji and clear dashboard visibility for task delivery.
